title: American Institute Global Group is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)

jsonLd.title: American Institute Global Group is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at American Institute Global Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Subject Matter Expert to strengthen our Mumbai-based team.

About American Institute Global Group:
American Institute Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with American Institute Global Group!
